form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of three months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at Cranbourne Bm62 January 10 over 1300m, 4 len behind Bons To Riches with 62kg at $5. First up last campaign ran last of 9 at Werribee Bm66 December 7 over 1400m, 10 len behind Princess Toro carrying 60kg at $14. Sure to be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Is first-up after a break of three months and has been in the money when fresh before. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover before obtaining the lead near the 800m.
Weakened from the 400m and then eased down over the final 100m.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of nine weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign won by neck Cranbourne Mdn-Sw February 6 over 1000m defeating Harry De Lad carrying 59.5kg at $1.60. Previously first up; eighth of 13 at Sale 4Upmdn-Sw December 21 over 1415m, soft track; 7 len behind Lafont with 59.5kg at $5.50. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 9 at this track Bm54 on March 28 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Step Forward with 59kg at $9. The race before that 4th of 7 at this track Bm54 on March 15 over 1100m, 6 len behind Mods carrying 58kg at $14. This looks too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped with another runner on jumping.
Shifted off heels passing the 200m and again at the 100m.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 9 at this track Bm54 on April 4 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Cap Ten carrying 59.5kg at $4.60. The start before that faded in the straight 5th of 11 at Oakbank Cl1 on March 18 over 1100m, slow going 1.4 len behind Silver Lifestyle carrying 56.5kg at $31. Worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Last start 5th of 9 at this track Bm54 on April 4 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Cap Ten carrying 59.5kg at $4.60. The start before that faded in the straight 5th of 11 at Oakbank Cl1 on March 18 over 1100m, slow going 1.4 len behind Silver Lifestyle carrying 56.5kg at $31. Worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages of the event.
Got its head up when steadied near the 1200m. Raced wide from the 600m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at this track Cl2 January 10 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Peace Baby with 53kg at $4.40. On debut fourth of 8 at Mornington F&M Mdn November 2 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Regina D'oro with 56.5kg at $9.50. Likely to feature.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 2nd in a small field at this track 3yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, head behind Grinzinger Tundra carrying 55.5kg at $4.20. Second run from a spell ran last of 7 at this track 3yo Bm68 on April 4 over 1400m, 18 len behind Leveraged Buyout carrying 53kg at $8.50. One of the main contenders.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Rider dropped his whip at the 200m.
Began awkwardly. Commenced to shift ground inwards from the 200m.
Began awkwardly bumping with another runner.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran last of 7 at this track Bm54 on March 15 over 1100m, 15 len behind Mods with 53kg at $4.60. Second-up 2nd of 8 at this track 0 - 58 on March 28 over 1000m, 4 len behind Suits carrying 56kg at $7.50. Has failed to show enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly bumping with another runner.
Began awkwardly momentarily unbalancing its rider.
Bumped with another runner on jumping.
Began to yield ground from the 600m losing contact with the field.
Began awkwardly bumping with another runner and raced wide throughout.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at this track Bm54 November 22 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Lean On Me carrying 55.5kg at $11. Previously first up; sixth of 10 at Darwin 0 - 58 July 12 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Alpha Street with 55.5kg at $21. Might need the run.
